description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: install and test, and a global before_script that runs git --version and ssh-add ~/.ssh/asic_tools_deploy. Add an install_job in the install stage that runs git submodule update --init --recursive then tests/scripts/install.sh, stores the tools/ directory as an artifact for 1 week, and only runs on the develop branch. Add test_CIC, test_CORDIC_serial, test_fftbutterfly32, test_fir32, test_hetero, and test_map9v3 jobs in the test stage, each depending on install_job, each executing tests/scripts/runTest.sh <design>.v, each publishing the test_designs/ directory as an artifact for 3 months with when: always, and each limited to the develop branch.
